elements.original_description: A minimalist living room with a sleek sofa, glass coffee table, and potted plants arranged neatly. The walls are bare except for a single abstract painting. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: A high-quality photograph of a minimalist living room with a sleek sofa, glass coffee table, and neatly arranged potted plants. The walls are bare except for a single abstract painting. Cinematic lighting with soft bokeh, high resolution, sharp focus, no text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

elements.original_description: A cartoonish calendar with every day marked with a red X, emphasizing the word 'every' in bold letters. The background is plain white. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
